blockers_encountered.description: Site 12 providers/enhanced_passthrough.py:157 system-prompt injection in EnhancedPassthroughProvider._resolve_request (a litellm CustomLLM provider-execution method). The only metadata in scope is built fresh at :171 as `dict(resolved_params.get('metadata') or {})`, stamped no_log=True + airlock_skip_fathom_logger=True, and handed to the INNER nested litellm.completion(**resolved_params). That inner call is explicitly suppressed from Airlock logging, so a ledger record written there never reaches the outer request data['metadata'] that OBS-served/headers/logger consume. The outer request ledger is not reachable without threading a new parameter through the litellm-defined CustomLLM.completion(self, model, messages, ...) contract (a do-not-absorb cross-file change). This injection is also a guardrail-ordering-independent fallback duplicating Site 11 (enhanced_interceptor), which already records the inject on the normal path.
blockers_encountered.resolution: FLAGGED — not forced. Did not thread a new param through the CustomLLM contract (orchestrator's call). Sites 1-11, 13-17 + drop_params form a correct, mergeable partial ledger. enhanced_passthrough.py left unchanged.
